title: Alex's Biome Dimensions
description: Each biome got it's own dimension you can explore, farm wood in the forest dimension or go hunt for some loot in the Cursed or Deep Dark dimension!
body:
Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/r8pw9NmfFH) for help

#


### **With the power of magical portals, you can enter dimensions that are entirely themed around a specific biome, offering an ideal location for exploration and resource gathering. Whether you want to explore a desert dimension, a lush forest, or even an icy tundra, this mod lets you handpick your biome destination.** 


# Preview Gallery:

### Lush Cave Dimension
![Lush Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f65bda2eda558dee36817e99dbfb0452e3db6d.webp)

### **Portal Block:**

Plains - Dirt

Forest - Oak Log

Desert - Sandstone

Snow - Blue Ice

Flower - Honey

Jungle - Jungle Wood Log

Aether - Glowstone

Lush Dimension - Flowering Azalea Leaves

Dark Forest - Dark Oak Log

Cherry Blossom - Cherry Blossom Log

Deep Dark - Sculk

Ocean - Prismarine

Cursed - Basalt
